zh.Waltham Abbey, Essex, England: 英國艾可沃爾坦 艾比
zh.Great Amwell, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾格亞特 阿維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Cheney於大約1560年出生在英國艾可沃爾坦 艾比時，她的父親Robert Cheney II41歲，母親Joane Harrison46歲。她於1580年6月9日與William Heath在英國艾可沃爾坦 艾比結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1604年之後在英國賀特福爾韋爾。

zh-hans.Great Amwell, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾格亞特 阿維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Cheney于大约1560年出生在英国艾可沃爾坦 艾比时，她的父亲Robert Cheney II41岁，母亲Joane Harrison46岁。她于1580年6月9日与William Heath在英国艾可沃爾坦 艾比结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1604年之后在英国賀特福爾韋爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cheney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Chaney   with the same etymology as in 2 below.

French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’), or a habitational name from any of several places called (Le) Cheney, e.g. in Haute-Savoie, named with this word. Compare Chesney .

French Canadian: altered form of French Chesnay or Chenay, topographic names with the same meaning and etymology as in 2 above, or habitational names from (Le) Chesnay or (Le) Chenay, names of several places in the northwestern part of France, based on Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’. Compare Chenette and Chenier 2.

variants.name: Chenette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Armand.
Altered form of French Canadian Chenet, itself an (intermediate) altered form of Cheney 3. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
History: The (majority of the) Chenettes are descendants of Bertrand Chesnay/Chenay dit/sieur de La Garenne from Brittany (France); see Cheney .

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Cheney was born about 1560, in Waltham Abbey, Essex, England, her father, Robert Cheney II, was 41 and her mother, Joane Harrison, was 46. She married William Heath on 9 June 1580, in Waltham Abbey, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1604, in Ware, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Cheney est née environ 1560, à Waltham Abbey, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Robert Cheney II, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Joane Harrison, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé William Heath le 9 juin 1580, à Waltham Abbey, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1604, à Ware, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Cheney um 1560 in Waltham Abbey, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Cheney II 41 und ihre Mutter Joane Harrison 46. Sie hat am 9. Juni 1580 in Waltham Abbey, Essex, England William Heath geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1604 in Ware, Hertfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Cheney è nata il circa 1560 nel Waltham Abbey, Essex, England, sua padre, Robert Cheney II, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Joane Harrison, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato William Heath il 9 giugno 1580, nel Waltham Abbey, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1604, nel Ware, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Cheneyが約1560年にイギリスエセックスワルサム アビーで生まれた時，父Robert Cheney IIは41歳，母Joane Harrisonは46歳であった。1580年6月9日にイギリスエセックスワルサム アビーでWilliam Heathと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1604年以後にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Cheney(이)가 대략 1560년 영국 에세스 월섬 애브브이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Cheney II(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane Harrison(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1580년 6월 9일 영국 에세스 월섬 애브브이에서 William Heath(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1604년 이후 영국 허트퍼드실르 워에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Cheney nasceu aproximadamente 1560, em Waltham Abbey, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Cheney II, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Joane Harrison, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com William Heath em 9 de junho de 1580, em Waltham Abbey, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1604, em Ware, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Cheney родилась около 1560 г. в местности валтам эбби, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Cheney II было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Joane Harrison, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Heath 9 июня 1580 г. в местности валтам эбби, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1604 г. в местности вар, хиртфордшир, Англия.

sm.about 1560–after 1604: e tusa o le 1560–ina ua ma'ea le 1604

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Cheney nació aproximadamente 1560, en Waltham Abbey, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Cheney II, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Joane Harrison, tenía 46 años. Se casó con William Heath el 9 de junio de 1580, en Waltham Abbey, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1604, en Ware, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
